positive: A vibrant, whimsical jungle flora and fauna montage, centered composition, featuring stylized jungle animals like friendly sloths and hummingbirds intertwined with exotic, glowing oversized leaves and tropical flowers. The style should be inspired by modern linocut and graphic illustration, giving it a clean, bold silhouette look with strong black lines on a pure white background. Use a limited, saturated color palette of emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and cream accents. High contrast, perfect for direct apparel printing, minimalist yet detailed, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, realistic photo, messy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise
